desc: Edits properties on an existing FilledRegion — currently supports changing its FilledRegionType via FilledRegion.ChangeTypeId.
summary: Edits properties on an existing FilledRegion — currently supports changing its FilledRegionType via FilledRegion.ChangeTypeId. Inputs are resolved from element IDs provided by the AI orchestrator via CommandExecutor.GetParameter.
usecase: User wants to change the hatch pattern or fill type of a filled region on a view.
notfor: Creating new filled regions. Not for editing detail lines or detail groups.
precondition: Active document must be open. Target FilledRegion must exist by element ID.
postcondition: The FilledRegion element has its type changed to the specified FilledRegionType.

outputs.name: Result
outputs.description: Filled region edit result including regionId and regionTypeId

thinkingsteps: Looking up FilledRegion element by ID...
